commands: vite-plus run script1 # create the cache for 'echo hello'
vite-plus run script2 # script2 has the same command as script1, should hit and associate the cache
jaq -i '.scripts.script2 = "echo world"' package.json # update the command of script2
vite-plus run script2 # should report cache miss due to command mismatch with the cache associated in step 2
